UPDATE produktionsAnlagenHistorie SET zeitintervallAnl = '2', einheitAnl = '2', einheitControlSys = '4', bemerkung = 'Bemerkung .', gueltigVon = '1-2021', gueltigBis = '4-2021', startDate = '2021',endDate = '2021',startWeek = '1',endWeek = '4',ending = '0',note = ' update 01-03 end no ending b' WHERE iBdeType = '1' AND prdktHist_ID = '8'
